flags.concern: Repository targeting: the plan is aimed at a different checkout than the stated repository, so following it literally will not implement this feature here.
flags.evidence: The stated project directory `/Users/peteromalley/.claude/skills/megaplan` contains only `SKILL.md`. The proposed edit targets (`megaplan/commands/finalize.py`, `megaplan/commands/execute.py`, `megaplan/commands/review.py`, `tests/`) do not exist there. Separately, `python -c 'import megaplan; print(megaplan.__file__)'` resolves to `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/__init__.py`, which is a different tree.

flags.concern: Executor test-scoping: the plan does not cover the finalize-time verification task text that currently tells the executor to keep fixing tests until all tests pass, so scope creep would survive even if the execute prompt is updated.
flags.evidence: In the actual implementation, `_ensure_verification_task()` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/handlers.py` appends a mandatory final task whose description says `If any test fails ... re-run until all tests pass.` The execute prompt in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/prompts/execute.py` repeats the same policy. The plan mentions prompt updates, but not this handler-generated task text.

flags.concern: Test evidence model: the review-side 'no regressions from baseline' goal is under-specified against the current artifact model, which does not persist structured post-execution test results for comparison.
flags.evidence: The current `execution.json` schema in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/schemas.py` only records `commands_run`, task notes, and file lists. `validate_execution_evidence()` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/evaluation.py` audits git status and perfunctory notes, not test outcomes. Review prompts in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/prompts/review.py` judge from `finalize.json`, `execution.json`, and the diff, so the plan needs explicit execution/review artifact plumbing for per-test before/after comparison instead of only a baseline file.
